perturbation.original_text: The term “ Evaluation Material ” includes, without limitation, all notes, analyses, compilations, spreadsheets, data, reports, studies, interpretations or other documents furnished by or on behalf of the Company to you or your Representatives (as defined below) or prepared by you or your Representatives, to the extent such materials reflect or are based upon the Evaluation Material. The term “ Evaluation Material ” does not include information that (a) is or becomes available to you on a nonconfidential basis from a source other than the Company or its Representatives; provided that such source is not known by you to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with, or other contractual, legal or fiduciary obligation to, the Company that prohibits such disclosure, (b) is or becomes available to the public other than as a result of a disclosure by you or your Representatives in violation of this letter agreement, (c) you can demonstrate is in your possession or the possession of your Representatives prior to receipt from the Company or its Representatives pursuant to this letter agreement, or (d) has been or is independently developed by you or your Representatives without the use of the Evaluation Material or in violation of the terms of this letter agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The term “ Evaluation Material ” includes, without limitation, all notes, analyses, compilations, spreadsheets, data, reports, studies, interpretations or other documents furnished by or on behalf of the Company to you or your Representatives (as defined below) or prepared by you or your Representatives, to the extent such materials reflect or are based upon the Evaluation Material. The term “ Evaluation Material ” includes information that (a) is or becomes available to you on a nonconfidential basis from a source other than the Company or its Representatives; provided that such source is not known by you to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with, or other contractual, legal or fiduciary obligation to, the Company that prohibits such disclosure, (b) is or becomes available to the public other than as a result of a disclosure by you or your Representatives in violation of this letter agreement, (c) you can demonstrate is in your possession or the possession of your Representatives prior to receipt from the Company or its Representatives pursuant to this letter agreement, or (d) has been or is independently developed by you or your Representatives without the use of the Evaluation Material or in violation of the terms of this letter agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the definition of Evaluation Material to include information previously excluded (nonconfidential information, publicly available information, etc.), we create a direct contradiction. The original definition specifies what Evaluation Material *does not* include, while the revised version implies that it *does* include those exceptions. This is contradicting the original text. In the definition Section.
perturbation.contradicted_text: As a condition to being furnished such confidential and proprietary information, you agree to treat any such information, whether written or oral, concerning the Company or any of its subsidiaries, Affiliates (as such term is defined in Rule 12b-2 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended) or divisions (whether prepared by the Company, its advisors or otherwise) that is furnished on or after the date hereof to you by or on behalf of the Company (herein collectively referred to as the “ Evaluation Material ”) in accordance with the provisions of this letter agreement and to take or abstain from taking certain other actions herein set forth. The term “ Evaluation Material ” includes, without limitation, all notes, analyses, compilations, spreadsheets, data, reports, studies, interpretations or other documents furnished by or on behalf of the Company to you or your Representatives (as defined below) or prepared by you or your Representatives, to the extent such materials reflect or are based upon the Evaluation Material. The term “ Evaluation Material ” includes information that (a) is or becomes available to you on a nonconfidential basis from a source other than the Company or its Representatives; provided that such source is not known by you to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with, or other contractual, legal or fiduciary obligation to, the Company that prohibits such disclosure, (b) is or becomes available to the public other than as a result of a disclosure by you or your Representatives in violation of this letter agreement, (c) you can demonstrate is in your possession or the possession of your Representatives prior to receipt from the Company or its Representatives pursuant to this letter agreement, or (d) has been or is independently developed by you or your Representatives without the use of the Evaluation Material or in violation of the terms of this letter agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the definition of 'Evaluation Material'. Originally, the definition explicitly excluded certain types of information (e.g., publicly available information) from being considered 'Evaluation Material'. The changed text includes information previously excluded, creating a direct contradiction within the document. The 'Contradicted Text' refers to 'Evaluation Material' as 'confidential and proprietary information,' but the changed text's definition of 'Evaluation Material' now includes information that is explicitly non-confidential, creating a direct conflict and therefore a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: You hereby agree that the Evaluation Material will be kept confidential and used solely for the purpose of evaluating, considering,negotiating and/or implementing the Possible Transaction; provided , however , that the Evaluation Material may be disclosed (i) to any of your Representatives who need to know such information solely for the purpose of evaluating, considering, negotiating and/or implementing a Possible Transaction, (ii) pursuant to an External Demand in accordance with paragraph 4 of this letter agreement and (iii) as the Company may otherwise consent in writing. All such Representatives shall (A) be informed by you of the confidential nature of the Evaluation Material, (B) agree to treat the Evaluation Material in accordance with this letter agreement, and (C) be advised of the terms of this letter agreement and directed to comply with the terms hereof to the same extent as if they were parties to this letter agreement. You agree to be responsible for any breaches of any of the provisions of this letter agreement by any of your Representatives (it being understood that such responsibility shall be in addition to and not by way of limitation of any right or remedy the Company may have against your Representatives with respect to such breach).
perturbation.changed_text: You hereby agree that the Evaluation Material may be disclosed at any time and for any purpose. All such Representatives shall (A) be informed by you of the non-confidential nature of the Evaluation Material, (B) be advised that they are not required to treat the Evaluation Material in accordance with this letter agreement, and (C) be advised of the terms of this letter agreement. You agree to not be responsible for any breaches of any of the provisions of this letter agreement by any of your Representatives (it being understood that such responsibility shall be by way of limitation of any right or remedy the Company may have against your Representatives with respect to such breach).
perturbation.explanation: By modifying Section 1, Non-Disclosure and Use of Evaluation Material to state that Evaluation Material may be disclosed at any time for any purpose, that the material is non-confidential, and that Ultragenyx is not responsible for any breaches of the agreement with their representatives, we create a direct contradiction with the original intention of the contract, as well as sections 2 (Securities Laws) and 3 (Transaction Information). This undermines the confidentiality clauses throughout the document, explicitly stating it is not needed. The text changed directly contradicts with the purpose of the contract.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You hereby acknowledge that you and your Representatives are aware, and will advise your Representatives, that the Evaluation Material may contain material, non-public information about the Company and that United States securities laws prohibit any person who has material, non-public information about a company from purchasing or selling any securities of the Company while in possession of such information.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 1 explicitly states that the Evaluation Material may be disclosed at any time for any purpose and that it is non-confidential. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that the Evaluation Material may contain material, non-public information about the Company and that United States securities laws prohibit any person who has material, non-public information about a company from purchasing or selling any securities of the Company while in possession of such information. The change directly undermines the confidentiality obligations and the warning about insider trading, creating a clear contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Securities Laws . You hereby acknowledge that you and your Representatives are aware, and will advise your Representatives, that the Evaluation Material may contain material, non-public information about the Company and that United States securities laws prohibit any person who has material, non-public information about a company from purchasing or selling any securities of the Company while in possession of such information.
perturbation.changed_text: Securities Laws . You hereby acknowledge that you and your Representatives are aware, and will advise your Representatives, that the Evaluation Material does not contain material, non-public information about the Company and that United States securities laws do not prohibit any person from purchasing or selling any securities of the Company while in possession of such information.
perturbation.explanation: The alteration directly contradicts the original text and the underlying premise of the confidentiality agreement. Originally, the contract stated that the Evaluation Material *may* contain material, non-public information. The change states that the Evaluation Material *does not* contain such information. This conflicts with Section 1, which outlines restrictions on use and disclosure based on the material's confidential nature. It also clashes with the purpose of a confidentiality agreement itself.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You hereby agree that the Evaluation Material will be kept confidential and used solely for the purpose of evaluating, considering,negotiating and/or implementing the Possible Transaction; provided , however , that the Evaluation Material may be disclosed (i) to any of your Representatives who need to know such information solely for the purpose of evaluating, considering, negotiating and/or implementing a Possible Transaction, (ii) pursuant to an External Demand in accordance with paragraph 4 of this letter agreement and (iii) as the Company may otherwise consent in writing. All such Representatives shall (A) be informed by you of the confidential nature of the Evaluation Material, (B) agree to treat the Evaluation Material in accordance with this letter agreement, and (C) be advised of the terms of this letter agreement and directed to comply with the terms hereof to the same extent as if they were parties to this letter agreement. You agree to be responsible for any breaches of any of the provisions of this letter agreement by any of your Representatives (it being understood that such responsibility shall be in addition to and not by way of limitation of any right or remedy the Company may have against your Representatives with respect to such breach).
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that the Evaluation Material *does not* contain material, non-public information. However, the contradicted text (Section 1) outlines restrictions on use and disclosure based on the material's confidential nature, implying that the Evaluation Material *does* contain such information. This creates a direct contradiction as the changed text negates the basis for the confidentiality obligations outlined in the contradicted text.

perturbation.original_text: You will not, and will direct your Representatives not to, disclose to any person (except (i) to your Representatives who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating, considering, negotiating and/or implementing a Possible Transaction and (ii) as the Company may otherwise consent in writing) either the fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place concerning the Possible Transaction or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to the Possible Transaction, including the status thereof or that Evaluation Material has been made available to you (such information, “ Transaction Information ”); provided , however , that disclosure of Transaction Information pursuant to an External Demand shall be governed by paragraph 4 of this letter agreement
perturbation.changed_text: You will, and will direct your Representatives to, disclose to any person the fact that discussions or negotiations are taking place concerning the Possible Transaction or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to the Possible Transaction, including the status thereof or that Evaluation Material has been made available to you (such information, “ Transaction Information ”); provided , however , that disclosure of Transaction Information pursuant to an External Demand shall be governed by paragraph 4 of this letter agreement
perturbation.explanation: Changing Section 3, Transaction Information, to state that Ultragenyx *will* disclose Transaction Information to any person, versus the original text that states Ultragenyx *will not* disclose this information, directly contradicts the confidentiality clauses of the contract. The clause in Section 1 that requires confidential treatment of the information would be directly contradicted by this change.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You hereby agree that the Evaluation Material will be kept confidential and used solely for the purpose of evaluating, considering,negotiating and/or implementing the Possible Transaction; provided , however , that the Evaluation Material may be disclosed (i) to any of your Representatives who need to know such information solely for the purpose of evaluating, considering, negotiating and/or implementing a Possible Transaction, (ii) pursuant to an External Demand in accordance with paragraph 4 of this letter agreement and (iii) as the Company may otherwise consent in writing. All such Representatives shall (A) be informed by you of the confidential nature of the Evaluation Material, (B) agree to treat the Evaluation Material in accordance with this letter agreement, and (C) be advised of the terms of this letter agreement and directed to comply with the terms hereof to the same extent as if they were parties to this letter agreement. You agree to be responsible for any breaches of any of the provisions of this letter agreement by any of your Representatives (it being understood that such responsibility shall be in addition to and not by way of limitation of any right or remedy the Company may have against your Representatives with respect to such breach).
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 3 now states that Ultragenyx *will* disclose Transaction Information to any person, while the contradicted text in Section 1 states that the Evaluation Material (which includes Transaction Information) will be kept confidential and used solely for the purpose of evaluating, considering,negotiating and/or implementing the Possible Transaction. This creates a direct contradiction because one section mandates disclosure while the other mandates confidentiality. The original text stated Ultragenyx *will not* disclose Transaction Information.

perturbation.original_text: You may determine not to pursue a Possible Transaction at any time and for any, or no, reason, and will promptly inform the Company at any time such a decision is made. Upon the Company’s demand, you shall, at your sole option, either promptly (a) destroy the Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, or (b) return to the Company all Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, and, in either case, confirm in writing to the Company that all such material has been destroyed or returned, as applicable, in compliance with this letter agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: You are required to pursue a Possible Transaction at all times and for any, or no, reason, and will fail to inform the Company at any time such a decision is made. Upon the Company’s demand, you are required to, destroy the Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, and, in either case, confirm in writing to the Company that all such material has been destroyed in compliance with this letter agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By changing Section 9, Destruction or Return of Evaluation Material, to state that Ultragenyx *is required* to pursue a Possible Transaction at all times, that they *will fail* to inform the Company if a decision is made, and are *required* to destroy evaluation materials, we directly contradict several assumptions of the original text and purpose of the agreement. For example, Section 11, Definitive Agreement, assumes there is *no legal obligation* until a definitive agreement has been made. This change directly contradicts that. This change would also contradict the original intent for both parties.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You agree that unless and until a definitive agreement between the Company and you with respect to the Possible Transaction (a “ Definitive Agreement ”) has been executed and delivered, neither the Company nor you will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to a Possible Transaction by virtue of this letter agreement or any other written or oral expression except, in the case of this letter agreement, for the matters specifically agreed to herein. In addition, 5 you hereby waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) in connection with any Possible Transaction other than claims under any Definitive Agreement relating to a Possible Transaction or under this letter agreement. For purposes of this letter agreement, the term “Definitive Agreement” does not include an executed letter of intent or any other preliminary written agreement, nor does it include any oral acceptance of an offer or bid by you. The agreement set forth in this paragraph may be modified or waived only by a separate writing by the Company and you expressly so modifying or waiving such agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text. The original text states that neither company nor Ultragenyx will be under any legal obligation until a definitive agreement is made. The changed text now states that Ultragenyx *is required* to pursue a Possible Transaction at all times, and *will fail* to inform the Company if a decision is made. This change imposes a legal obligation to pursue the transaction, which is a direct contradiction of the provision in the contradicted text that states neither party is under any legal obligation unless a definitive agreement is executed.

perturbation.original_text: You agree that unless and until a definitive agreement between the Company and you with respect to the Possible Transaction (a “ Definitive Agreement ”) has been executed and delivered, neither the Company nor you will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to a Possible Transaction by virtue of this letter agreement or any other written or oral expression except, in the case of this letter agreement, for the matters specifically agreed to herein.
perturbation.changed_text: You agree that before a definitive agreement between the Company and you with respect to the Possible Transaction (a “ Definitive Agreement ”) has been executed and delivered, both the Company nor you will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to a Possible Transaction by virtue of this letter agreement or any other written or oral expression except, in the case of this letter agreement, for the matters specifically agreed to herein.
perturbation.explanation: In the original contract, this section states that *unless and until* a definitive agreement has been executed, the parties are not legally bound. The removal of the word *unless*, implies legal obligation even *before* a definitive agreement has been made, therefore, directly contradictary. The clause in Section 9 that mentions they're not obligated for a possible transaction directly conflicts with that.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You may determine not to pursue a Possible Transaction at any time and for any, or no, reason, and will promptly inform the Company at any time such a decision is made. Upon the Company’s demand, you shall, at your sole option, either promptly (a) destroy the Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, or (b) return to the Company all Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, and, in either case, confirm in writing to the Company that all such material has been destroyed or returned, as applicable, in compliance with this letter agreement.
perturbation.justification: The change from "unless and until" to "before" in the Changed Text creates a direct contradiction with the Contradicted Text. The original text specifies no legal obligation until a definitive agreement is executed. The changed text implies legal obligation before such an agreement, conflicting with the freedom to 'not pursue a Possible Transaction at any time' outlined in the Contradicted Text. This aligns with the Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction definition because the altered clause directly contradicts the intended freedom described in the Contradicted Text.
